subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Ittihad
subcodes.first_line: The letter of one of the Sádát, they who have set themselves towards God and having heard the Call have answered their Lord, the All-Loving
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر لدی المظلوم کتاب احد من السادات الذین اقبلوا الی الله و سمعوا و اجابوا
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @the power of words; of speech, @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @pride; vanity; laying claim to inner knowledge, @wisdom [hikmat], @unity in diversity
